name: snowflake-cortex-code
description: Automatically route Snowflake prompts from Codex to Cortex Code for execution.

interface.shortDescription: Auto-route Snowflake prompts to Cortex Code
interface.longDescription: Automatically detect Snowflake-related prompts and route them to Cortex Code CLI for execution. Includes 40+ bundled Snowflake skills for SQL, data governance, dynamic tables, and more.
